description_long: This house features a dark wooden exterior with intricate lattice window designs and a prominent, steeply pitched hip roof in a light gray color. The front facade includes a balcony with a stone or concrete floor, furnished with a lounge chair, and a sliding shoji-style door leading inside. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with decorative wooden grilles adding an ornate touch to the structure. The main entryway is marked by a set of double wooden doors beneath a small overhang, providing a sheltered entrance. The house has two visible stories, with the upper level slightly overhanging the lower in some sections. The overall design blends traditional East Asian architectural elements with modern residential features.
description: A two-story house with a dark wooden exterior, ornate lattice windows, a steep hip roof, and a balcony with a shoji-style door. The design combines traditional East Asian and modern residential elements.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the house with a balcony, a lounge chair, and a sliding shoji-style door, as well as symmetrical lattice windows.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the main entryway with double wooden doors, additional lattice windows, and the overhanging upper story.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two lattice windows on the upper floor and a plain lower section, with the roof's hip structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: This side view features an octagonal lattice window, more symmetrical window arrangements, and the balcony's side profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with decorative lattice grilles
attribute_entryway_design: Double wooden doors beneath a small overhang, no steps, with decorative latticework and a sheltered balcony above.
